title: Seed Spec
description: Mission specification produced by the intake gate. Freezes what we're building before execution begins.

constraints.description: Technical or business constraints (e.g., 'Must use relational database', 'No paid APIs')

assumptions.description: Assumptions surfaced during intake that the user confirmed

acceptance_criteria.description: Measurable criteria that define 'done'. Minimum 3 required.

scope_out.description: Features and capabilities explicitly excluded. Minimum 1 required to prove scope was considered.

ambiguity_notes.description: Remaining ambiguities acknowledged but deferred (with rationale)

completeness_checklist.description: Binary checklist confirming each section was reviewed and approved by the user

source.description: How this seed was created. 'full_intake' = complete Socratic intake. 'quick_intake' = minimal auto-generated seed (user skipped detailed intake). 'existing_project' = auto-generated for first-time geas usage on an existing project.

readiness_override.description: True if user explicitly skipped the intake process ('just build it')

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the seed was frozen
